title: customsInformation
description: Data about the customs information object.

product_id.description: The ID of the product which the customs information data will apply to.

country_of_origin.description: The country of manufacture, production, or growth represented in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

commodity_description.description: Description that provides information for customs to identify and verify shapes physical characteristics and packaging of each shipment.

international_shipping.description: Flag to determine whether this product will be shipped internationally.

created_at.description: Date and time when the customs information was created.

updated_at.description: Date and time when the customs information was last updated.
